title: How to Create Custom Skills in Claude  (Step-by-Step)
summary: A tutorial on creating custom skills in Claude to shape model output through structured instructions. The example demonstrates a "Smart PDF Analyzer" skill that produces 5-point summaries with formatting, showing how custom instructions improve response quality without changing the underlying model.
